item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-034","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant immediately refuses adding a third fallback, identifies the existing two-fallback state as a red flag, and redirects to root-cause isolation of the unstable test. It explicitly frames further fallback layering as hiding the real failure and demands logs/reproduction evidence before proceeding. Although it leaves a narrow future possibility for a new independent failure mode, the current requested action is rejected and the answer strongly satisfies the anti-spiral criterion."}
